support.title: Support KoboManager
support.subtitle: Free software to give your team controlled access to KoboToolbox data. Use it, improve it, and — if you find it useful — help us keep expanding it.
support.freeBody: KoboManager is free software (AGPL-3.0 license): you may use, study, modify and self-host it at no cost. The source code and install instructions are in the public repository.
support.donateBody: Development is sustained by one person. If the app saves you work, a donation — any size — helps keep it maintained and add new features.
support.servicesBody: We offer professional services around KoboManager, without locking up the code (it stays free):
support.service1: Turnkey installation (server, domain, HTTPS, Kobo connection and first admin).
support.service2: Support and maintenance (updates, security patches, backups).
support.service3: Custom development (reports, integrations, custom fields or flows).
support.service4: Training for the team that will use the tool.
support.contactBody: Want to hire a service, propose an improvement, or tell us something about the app? If you're an organization already using KoboManager, we'd love to hear from you.
support.okBody: Thanks for reaching out. We'll reply to the email you provided.
support.errGeneric: The message couldn't be sent. Please try again in a moment.
support.errRate: You've sent too many messages. Please wait a bit and try again.
support.errEmail: Check the email: it doesn't look valid.
